summary: A compact rectangular bunker-style structure with a stepped pyramid brick roof, concrete foundation platform, and a single row of three windows on the main wall. The building sits in a recessed foundation with white concrete borders and is surrounded by dirt and grass terrain.

shape.overall_form: rectangular box with stepped pyramid roof

rebuild_hints: Create a rectangular foundation pit with white concrete borders approximately 10×12 blocks
Build main walls from sandstone blocks with stonebrick corner reinforcement
Place three evenly-spaced glass windows in a horizontal row on front face
Construct stepped pyramid roof using brick blocks in 4-5 ascending layers, each layer smaller than the last
Add concrete trim band between main wall and roof section
Ensure roof steps are centered and symmetrical
Surround foundation with dirt terrain and grass surface
uncertainties: Exact window dimensions and spacing uncertain from angles shown
Interior layout and floor plan not visible
Precise block count for roof pyramid steps estimated from visual perspective
Depth dimension estimated; may vary by 1-2 blocks
Material of lower wall section could be sandstone or stone variant
